How to Copy the USCIS Civics Trainer fro.filename: How to Copy the USCIS Civics Trainer from GitHub

description: Follow these steps to copy the civics trainer prompt from GitHub: 1️⃣ Tap RAW at the top right of the page 2️⃣ Press and hold anywhere in the text 3️⃣ Tap Select All 4️⃣ Tap Copy Once copied: • Open ChatGPT • Paste the trainer into a new chat • Press Send • Type START to begin the civics test All text will now be copied and ready to use.
